title: Using Charm and Restraint, Japan’s Leader Mostly Avoids Trump’s Wrath
summary_full: During her first visit to the White House, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi drew praise from President Trump. But the war in the Middle East will test their relationship.
summary_public: During her first visit to the White House, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi drew praise from President Trump. But the war in the Middle East will test their relationship.
